jobs.title: Customer Experience Manager
jobs.content: <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">As Marqeta’s&nbsp;<strong>CX Manager,</strong> you will be at the forefront of transforming customer experience into a competitive advantage.&nbsp; This role puts you in the embedded-payments ecosystem.</span></p><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Customer Experience Manager partners with Risk Operations & Product to scale the post-launch enablement curriculum across Fortune 500 cohorts.</p>

jobs.title: Group Product Manager, Fraud
jobs.content: <p>Marqeta is the modern card-issuing platform powering embedded payments and instant funds disbursement across the Fortune 1000 cohort.</p><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Group Product Manager, Fraud partners with Engineering and Risk Operations to ship the fraud-detection pipelines that protect Marqeta’s issuers and program managers.</p>
